name: documentation-governor
description: Portable Codex plugin for enforced documentation refresh, project discovery, and CI doc gating.

interface.shortDescription: Keep docs synchronized with code and project inventory changes.
interface.longDescription: Bundles a Codex skill, deterministic governance scripts, and repo templates so documentation refreshes can be enforced instead of remembered.
defaultPrompt: Refresh docs for the code changed in this branch.
Update the project catalog and documentation status files.
Explain why the docs governance check is failing.
